targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS `Total`,
  SUM((SELECT hu.value FROM history_uint hu JOIN items ii ON ii.itemid=hu.itemid WHERE ii.hostid=h.hostid AND ii.key_='icmpping' ORDER BY hu.clock DESC LIMIT 1)=1) AS `UP`,
  SUM((SELECT hu.value FROM history_uint hu JOIN items ii ON ii.itemid=hu.itemid WHERE ii.hostid=h.hostid AND ii.key_='icmpping' ORDER BY hu.clock DESC LIMIT 1)=0) AS `DOWN`,
  SUM((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items i2 WHERE i2.hostid=h.hostid AND i2.status=0)>100) AS `SNMP`,
  SUM((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items i3 WHERE i3.hostid=h.hostid AND i3.status=0)<=100) AS `so ICMP`
FROM hosts h JOIN hosts_groups hg ON hg.hostid=h.hostid WHERE hg.groupid=665 AND h.status=0

SELECT CASE WHEN h.name LIKE '%IBM Power%' OR h.name LIKE '%Service Processor%' OR h.name LIKE '%HMC%' THEN 'IBM Power/HMC'
  WHEN h.name LIKE '%UCS%' THEN 'Cisco UCS' WHEN h.name LIKE '%PowerFlex%' OR h.name LIKE '%Dell%' THEN 'PowerFlex/Dell' ELSE 'Outros' END AS Tipo,
  COUNT(*) AS Hosts FROM hosts h JOIN hosts_groups hg ON hg.hostid=h.hostid WHERE hg.groupid=665 AND h.status=0 GROUP BY Tipo

SELECT
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(h.name,' [',1),' - ',-1) AS Equipamento,
  h.name AS Host,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items i2 WHERE i2.hostid=h.hostid AND i2.status=0) AS Items,
  CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items i3 WHERE i3.hostid=h.hostid AND i3.status=0) > 100
       THEN 'SNMP' ELSE 'ICMP' END AS Tier,
  (SELECT hu.value FROM history_uint hu JOIN items ii ON ii.itemid=hu.itemid
     WHERE ii.hostid=h.hostid AND ii.key_='icmpping' ORDER BY hu.clock DESC LIMIT 1) AS `ICMP`
FROM hosts h
JOIN hosts_groups hg ON hg.hostid=h.hostid
WHERE hg.groupid=665 AND h.status=0
GROUP BY h.hostid
ORDER BY `ICMP` ASC, Tier DESC, Host

panels.title: Frota física — tier de monitoria e disponibilidade
